content.en:
Twenty-ninth floor.

After Ye Tian came here, he didn't find anything, and then he tried to enter the thirtieth layer, and in the passage to the thirtieth layer, he actually saw a projection of the ultimate supreme statue.

However, the projection of this Ultimate Extreme Statue does not have the consciousness of the Ultimate Extreme Being, it is just an unconscious projection formed by the power of the Ultimate Extreme Being.

As soon as he entered, he was attacked by this projection.

"The assessment of this level turned out to be a fight with the projection of the ultimate supreme!"

Ye Tian was very surprised.

Fortunately, the power of this Ultimate Extreme Projection was very weak, otherwise, he had almost no hope of defeating such a "Four, Six, Three" Ultimate Extreme Projection.

Thundered!!!

Ye Tian and this Ultimate Extreme Statue were constantly killing, and he seemed to suppress the other party, but he couldn't defeat it no matter what.

"The Ultimate Dao possessed by this Ultimate Extremity has terrifying recovery abilities, and even if it hurts him, it will recover quickly. "

"Moreover, the Ultimate Extreme Zun's control over power is really terrifying, far beyond me, in terms of energy, this Ultimate Extreme Zun projection does not contain much energy, the breath is not strong, and the ultimate Dao power controlled is not much, but it can burst out with terrifying combat power!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

After fighting for a long time, Ye Tian still didn't win, but he was no longer in a hurry to defeat this projection of the Ultimate Extreme Venerable.

For him, the projection of this Ultimate Extreme Deity is completely a teacher, and he can learn a lot of Ultimate Extremity's control of power and the Ultimate Way from others, which is very useful to him.

this day.

Ye Tian retreated to the twenty-ninth floor, then sat cross-legged and began to comprehend the insights gained during the battle.

After a period of time, he went to challenge the projection of this ultimate supreme statue, and after fighting for a long time, he returned to the twenty-ninth floor.

In this way, Ye Tian adjusted the projection of this ultimate supreme statue again and again, and completely regarded him as his sparring partner.

And this itself is also the intention of the assessment from the 29th to the 30th floor, using the ultimate extreme projection as a sparring partner, where can the outside world find such a good opportunity!

It is also only available in the Ultimate Tower, and this is also the opportunity to enter the Ultimate Tower.

But the premise is to be able to enter the twenty-ninth layer, and some Eternal Ultimate Realm masters are afraid that they will not be able to enter the twenty-ninth layer forever, so don't think about using the Ultimate Extreme Projection as a sparring partner.

That's it.

Ye Tian learned more and more insights from the Ultimate Supreme Projection, and he was slowly improving.

At his level, every step of progress is extremely difficult, and being able to make continuous progress in the battle against the Ultimate Supreme Projection is already very good.

Countless years of the Ultimate Era have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian could already defeat this Ultimate Extreme Projection, but he didn't do so, and he was still squeezing the last value of this Ultimate Extreme Projection.

And just like that, another period of time passed.

this day.

Through the perception of fighting with the ultimate supreme projection, Ye Tian successfully created an ultimate arcane art—Breaking the Void!

Breaking the void can be said to be an upgraded version of the ultimate arcane art of tearing the sky, it can be said that everything is cut, but the consumption is also very large, unlike the trick of tearing the sky, which can be used casually.

After creating the Void Breaking move, Ye Tian didn't wait any longer, and killed the Ultimate Extreme Extreme Projection again.

"Broken Void!"

As soon as this move came out, the projection of the Ultimate Supreme Venerable was completely penetrated, and the body began to dissipate, and it was actually killed by Ye Tian in one move....

Subsequently, he entered the thirtieth floor.

"It's the thirtieth floor, the ultimate tower is only thirty-six floors in total, I'm not far from the tower!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He wanted to get out of the tower too much, not for freedom, but mainly after leaving the tower, he could go to the ultimate supreme, so as to leave the ultimate land and return to the human race.

He hadn't seen his family for too long, and he didn't know what was going on with the Terrans or if they were safe.

In Ye Tian's assessment from the thirtieth layer to the thirty-first floor, he once again encountered another Ultimate Extreme Projection, but this Ultimate Extreme Projection was a completely different style, and it was also a completely unfamiliar Ultimate Way.

Fighting with this ultimate supreme projection, you will inevitably gain other insights.

So, Ye Tian continued to fight with this ultimate projection.

Of course, with his current strength, it would be easy to defeat this Ultimate Extreme Projection, but he was not in a hurry, he was ready to spend some more years to gain more comprehension.

After all, with a little more comprehension, the 5.4 will hit the ultimate extreme, and the success rate will be more.

So, he stayed on this level for a long time before entering the thirty-first layer.

The next level is all a Ultimate Extreme Projection, especially on the thirty-fifth floor, he has encountered several Ultimate Extreme Projections, and that battle is also extremely difficult, but the gain is also huge.

After a long time, he came to the last floor, which was the thirty-sixth floor.

If you want to leave the Ultimate Tower from the 36th floor, you must complete the final assessment.

And this assessment is also the most difficult assessment of the ultimate tower, and it is also the one that takes the longest time.
